name: Chocolate Dream Drops
recipeIngredient: 2 squares unsweetened baking chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream together the margarine, crisco, cream cheese, and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the egg, vanilla, and milk to the mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Mix in the melted baking chocolate and dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt).
5. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8 minutes or until set.
